title: Pinnacle West Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: PHOENIX--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pinnacle West Capital Corporation’s (NYSE: PNW) board of directors today declared a quarterly dividend of $0.865 per share of common stock, payable on March 1, 2023, to shareholders of record at the close of business on Feb. 1, 2023. Pinnacle West Capital Corp., an energy holding company based in Phoenix, has consolidated assets of approximately $23 billion, about 6,300 megawatts of generating capacity and nearly 5,900 employees in Arizona and New Mexico. Through its principal subsidiary, Arizona Public Service, the company provides retail electricity service to more than 1.3 million Arizona homes and businesses. For more information about Pinnacle West, visit the company’s website at pinnaclewest.com.

title: The 7 Best Mid-Cap Stocks to Buy Right Now
text: While the large-capitalization firms attract massive institutional support and the small enterprises grab retail eyeballs, the center lane investments – even those labeled the best mid-cap stocks to buy – tend to languish on the sidelines. However, the extraordinary events of the post-pandemic new normal brings plenty of value for this segment.
